text:
Golden Guidebook (黄金るるぶ) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. It summons a book which tells you where to find people of your type.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Golden Guidebook 黄金るるぶ - This card summons forth a travel guide for the player. It shows a detailed list of where and when you can meet people of your type. This card only shows people of the opposite gender however.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.010 - 黄金るるぶ 
旅情報の雑誌。持ち主の好みの異性に出会える場所と時間を、数多く掲載している。
|-
![Eng]
|No.010 - Golden Guidebook 
A magazine of travel information. It has posted a number, place and time to meet the opposite sex of preference of the owner.
|}
